title: Earnings Call Transcript: Petco Q4 2025 Misses Forecasts, Stock Edges Up
text: Earnings Call Transcript: Petco Q4 2025 Misses Forecasts, Stock Edges Up. Q4 2025 Earnings Miss: Petco Health and Wellness Company, Inc. (WOOF) reported its fiscal Q4 2025 earnings, revealing a miss on both earnings per share (EPS) and revenue forecasts. The company posted an EPS of -$0.01 against a forecast of $0.02, a 150% negative surprise. Revenue reached $1.5 billion, slightly below the expected $1.51 billion. Stock Performance: Despite the misses, the stock saw a modest aftermarket increase of 1.29%, trading at $2.36. Full Year 2025 Performance: Despite the Q4 miss, the full year 2025 results were strong: Petco increased Adjusted EBITDA 21.3% to $408 million and delivered positive GAAP net income for the year. Additionally, free cash flow improved 276% versus the prior year to $187 million. This suggests the market focused on the stronger full-year profitability improvements rather than the quarterly miss.
